title: 4Pcs 250ml Glass Milk Bottles,with Pretty Gingham Lids Reusable Milk Bottle for Juices, Dressings, Sauces, Beverages, Decoration and Storage
features: 🍼Set of 4 reusable glass milk bottles, the bottle measures 14 cm tall x 5 cm diameter, capacity is 250 ml.
🍼It's cute and practical. 250ml in capacity, it's a perfect choice for homemade milk, yogurt, pudding, jello, jam, honey and so on.

🍼These glass milk bottles with lids are BPA-free and made with 100% food-grade glass. They resist discoloration, stains, and the transmission of taste and odours.Furthermore, they can withstand temperatures of up to a maximum of 100℃.

🍼These bottles are not just for milk; use them for storing juices, smoothies, homemade sauces, vinaigrettes, kombucha, freshly collected honey or even as decorative containers. You can even use these milk bottles for your arts and crafts materials or a DIY vase for keeping freshly picked flowers!
🍼ALL Products you've purchased at MEETOZ Amazon store can be returned and replaced freely if there's any quality problem.
description: Product Details Manufacturer: ‎MEETOZ Package Dimensions: ‎14 x 5cm; Colour: ‎250ml - 4 Pack Style: ‎Classic Milk Bottles Material: ‎Glass Shape: ‎Round Special Features: ‎Leak Proof
